_comment: JGA Enterprise OS — State BRIC Configuration. See ARCHITECTURE_BRICKS_STITCH.md § 2.3
_rules: Each entry maps a state tag to its BRIC runtime configuration.
kmsKeyId and iamPrincipal MUST be set via environment/secrets management before go-live.
active=false means the BRIC is provisioned but not yet accepting work.
New entries require Compliance Agent approval (GATE-05) before active=true.
